name: The last farewell
developer: Yas Rose, Abu Al Hassan Qasim, Sakura, Ahmed Mohamed Abdel Baqer, Nelli, Hussein Alaa Hatf
short_description: This game is a hidden object puzzle that combines story, psychological horror and reality.
detailed_description:
The last farewell

Get ready for an exciting and touching journey in the visual story game "The Last Farewell".

The story begins with the protagonist, Makoto, returning to his old hometown of Kamikawa in Japan after a long absence. This colorful and memorable world takes you on a romantic exploration journey, where Makoto meets unique characters and begins to build new friendships, in addition to entering into a love affair with the heroine.

As time passes, Makoto steps towards independence, and begins to create his own home, giving him a sense of freedom and renewal. But these happy moments soon dissipate when the perfect world around him begins to collapse.

Signs of an unexpected flaw appear, and Makoto discovers a dark secret that changes the course of his life. It is revealed to him that everything he thought was real was just an illusion, threatening his life and the lives of his loved ones.

Game Features:

- A deep story full of emotional complexities and surprises.

- Interactive options that affect the course of events and relationships.

- Charming 2D graphics that embody the beauty of Kamikawa.

- An emotional soundtrack that immerses the player in the story.

Can Makoto face the painful truths and save what she loves before it's too late? Embark on "The last farewell" and discover how life can change from one moment to the next.

Error!!

(Imagine playing a game that is supposed to be a visual novel and a normal romantic story in a 2D world and talking to the characters. Then what is this glitch, illusion, trick, crime, you discover that this whole game is an illusion lived by one of the victims of a serial murder in Japan and the hero of the story wakes up in a red room and ..... I think that's enough. Welcome to The last farewell, a name that indicates a romantic story, right? Haha wake up)

supported_languages:
English, French, Italian, German, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese*, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
